title: delphinium delavayi var. lasiandrum
intro: Delphinium delavayi var. lasiandrum, also known as the Chinese delphinium or lasiandra, is a plant species within the delphinium family that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The plant's roots and stems are said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits associated with the plant include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or powder, and is also used in herbal preparations such as infusions and poultices.
